title: lagenocarpus stellatus
intro: Lagenocarpus stellatus, also known as the star-stemmed floating fern or floating water fern, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Thuidiaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Lagenocarpus stellatus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties.
